spec.precondition: requires valid(buf) && valid(tensor) && null(tensor->data) && null(tensor->view_src) && in_bounds(buf->chunks, buf_addr.chunk) && valid(buf->chunks[buf_addr.chunk]) && buf_addr.offset != SIZE_MAX && buf_addr.offset + ggml_backend_buft_get_alloc_size(ggml_backend_buffer_get_type(buf->chunks[buf_addr.chunk]), tensor) <= ggml_backend_buffer_get_size(buf->chunks[buf_addr.chunk])
spec.postcondition: ensures valid(tensor->buffer) && valid(tensor->data) && tensor->data points to allocated memory at buf_addr.offset within buf->chunks[buf_addr.chunk] && tensor->buffer == buf->chunks[buf_addr.chunk]
